message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant "ShipCaptain" as SC
participant ":System" as S

SC -> S : 1 ask the system to see how much the vessel sink
S --> SC : 2 ask the ship's captain to the ship data to indentify and the voyage id to know the total of containers
SC -> S : 3 introduces the data asked
S -> S : 4 get the ship and the voyage and make all calculation
S --> SC : 5 shows the results and informs the success of the operation
@enduml
```
